programme.desc: A featherweight clash between Dat Nguyen and Daniel Straus. From Delray Beach Tennis Center in Delray Beach, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 87 Hollywood: Stewart vs. Gaffie
programme.desc: Featuring Kai Stewart vs. Nico Gaffie, Rosalinda Rodriguez vs. Shelby Cannon, plus more in bare-knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Newcastle: Terrill vs. McFarlane
programme.desc: Mick Terrill vs. Ghost McFarlane, heavyweight title bout. From Newcastle, U.K.

programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Eddie Alvarez, middleweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Maverik Center in Salt Lake City. From Dec. 2, 2023.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: No. 2-ranked featherweight Adam Borics meets Mads Burnell in the main event. Plus, a light heavyweight bout between Phil Davis and Julius Anglickas. From the Family Arena in St. Louis, March 12, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 43: Alexander vs. Smith
programme.desc: Houston Alexander vs. Jeremy Smith, cruiserweights; Dakota Cochrane vs. Noah Cutter, middleweights; Brandon Meyer vs. Sean Wilson. From Liberty First Arena in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: BKFC 47: Mundell vs. Richman
programme.desc: David Mundell vs. Mike Richman, middleweight championship bout. From Jenkins Arena in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 49: Slaveski vs. Lindsey
programme.desc: Gorjan Slaveski vs. Jake Lindsey, welterweight championship bout; Bryce Henry vs. Tom Shoaff, lightweight. From Miami-Dade Fairgrounds in Miami-Dade County, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 50: Hunt vs. Camozzi
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Chris Camozzi, cruiserweight championship bout; Keegan Vandermeer vs. Tyler Winemiller; Andrew Yates vs. Christian Torres, welterweight. From 1st Bank Center in Denver.

programme.title: BKFC 57
programme.desc: Ryan Reber vs. Derek Perez, bantamweight; Stephen Townsel vs. Leo Bercier, cruiserweight; Matt Russo vs. Justin Street, flyweight. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bantamweight World Grand Prix continues as Raufeon Stots takes on Danny Sabatello and Patchy Mix meets Magomed Magomedov in the semifinals. Plus, Liz Carmouche defends her flyweight title against Juliana Velasquez. From Dec. 9, 2022.

programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: Searching for Awe in Lake Tahoe
programme.desc: Dr. Paul Piff begins research at Lake Tahoe to discover what connects us in an era of loneliness and division.
